code:
var tree = Engine.get_main_loop() as SceneTree
var root = tree.edited_scene_root
var x = root.get_node_or_null("xiaokong")
if x == null:
	executeContext.output("err", "no_x")
	return
var p1 = x.get_node_or_null("AnimationPlayer") as AnimationPlayer
var p2 = x.get_node_or_null("FaceAnimationPlayer") as AnimationPlayer
if p1 == null or p2 == null:
	executeContext.output("err", "missing_players")
	return

var body_lib = ResourceLoader.load("res://resources/animate/xiaokong_base.tres", "", ResourceLoader.CACHE_MODE_REPLACE) as AnimationLibrary
var face_lib = ResourceLoader.load("res://resources/animate/xiaokong_face.tres", "", ResourceLoader.CACHE_MODE_REPLACE) as AnimationLibrary
if body_lib == null or face_lib == null:
	executeContext.output("err", "missing_lib")
	return

p1.remove_animation_library(&"")
var e1 = p1.add_animation_library(&"", body_lib)
p2.remove_animation_library(&"")
var e2 = p2.add_animation_library(&"", face_lib)

var body_face_count = 0
for n in p1.get_animation_list():
	if String(n).begins_with("face_"):
		body_face_count += 1

executeContext.output("assign_body_err", str(e1))
executeContext.output("assign_face_err", str(e2))
executeContext.output("body_total", str(p1.get_animation_list().size()))
executeContext.output("body_face_count", str(body_face_count))
executeContext.output("face_total", str(p2.get_animation_list().size()))
